title: Senior Software Engineer - Google India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Google India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Google India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Google India:
Google India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India!
